task_description: Build a Python application that scrapes NBA Mock Draft data from multiple sources, aggregates predictions using weighted consensus, outputs a 2026 draft prediction, and validates accuracy via backtesting against 2024 actual draft results.

verification.summary: All 29 tests pass. Backtest mode produces 33.3% exact match, 76.7% within-3-picks, 0.8529 Kendall tau. Predict mode successfully scrapes 3/4 sources (72 predictions) and produces a 30-pick 2026 draft board.
